In a rice cooking net or strainer, rinse rice in same method as sushi rice, ~3-4 times or until just before clear water.
Strain, and reserve to rice cooker pot.
Cook with water and miola.
In a mixing bowl or otherwise appropriate container, combine vinegar, salt, and sugar.
Once rice is finished cooking, reserve to Hangiri (sushi rice mixing bowl).
Break rice slightly with Shimoji paddle, then fan half of the vinegar mix with the shimoji.
Cut the rice with the vinegar, mixing and breaking up clumps of grains. Add additional vinegar as mixed.
Once all grains are individually seasoned and mixed, and all rice is homogenous and seasoned, reserve to lexans.
